options.name: List Collections

options.name: Delete Collection

options.name: Upsert Points

options.name: Retrieve Point

options.name: Retrieve Points
options.description: Retrieve all details from multiple points

options.name: Delete Points
options.description: Delete specified points from the collection

options.name: Count Points
options.description: Counts the number of points that match a specified filtering condition

options.name: Scroll Points
options.description: Returns all points in a page-by-page manner

options.name: Batch Update Points
options.description: Batch update points, including their respective vectors and payloads

options.name: Update Vectors
options.description: Update specified vectors on points

options.name: Delete Vectors
options.description: Delete specified vectors from points

options.name: Set Payload
options.description: Sets payload values for specified points

options.name: Overwrite Payload
options.description: Replaces the entire payload of specified points with a new payload

options.name: Delete Payload
options.description: Deletes specified payload keys from points

options.name: Clear Payload
options.description: Removes the entire payload for specified points

options.name: Payload Facets
options.description: Retrieves facets for the specified payload field

options.name: Create Payload Index
options.description: Creates a payload index for a field in the specified collection

options.name: Delete Payload Index
options.description: Deletes a payload index for a field in the specified collection

options.name: Query Points
options.description: Query points in a collection using various search methods

options.name: Query Batch Points
options.description: Query multiple points in batch using various search methods

options.name: Query Points Groups
options.description: Query points and group results by a specified payload field

options.name: Matrix Pairs
options.description: Retrieve sparse matrix of pairwise distances between points sampled from the collection

options.name: Matrix Offsets
options.description: Retrieve sparse matrix of pairwise distances between points sampled from the collection
